label: Bar chart
description: Compare a measure across categories; multiple series can be grouped or stacked, horizontal or vertical.

params.label: Rows
params.description: One object per category; keys are the plotted fields.

params.label: Series
params.description: Which row keys to plot and their labels.

params.label: Stacked
params.description: Stack series into one bar instead of grouping.

params.label: Legend
params.description: Show the series legend (auto for ≥2 series).

params.label: Height
params.description: Pixel height, or a percent string for responsive containers.

params.label: Palette
params.description: Ordered hex colours; series/slices take them in turn.
